text: I can act no more friends and companions have all forsaken me

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: Soon as a man is fully disposed to be alone with God

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: He is alone with God no matter where he may be in the country the monastery the woods or the city

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: The lightning flashes from east to west

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: Illuminating the whole horizon and striking where it pleases and at the same instant the infinite liberty of God

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: Flashes in the depths of that man's soul and he is eluminant at that moment

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch

text: He sees that though he seems to be in the middle of his journey

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch

text: He has already arrived at the end for the life of grace on

text: although he is a traveler in time

text: May I say that

source: THE STAGES OF CONSCIOUSNESS_ Ram Dass on the Bhagavad Gita__watch
speaker: Ram Dass
text: Yet of course we'll turn out to be an illusion too, but that will come in due time and these are some instructions to you from Cheng Su

speaker: Ram Dass
